name: Light Industrial Staffing

availability.description: Shift availability (days, nights, weekends), start date, transportation reliability

proximity.description: Distance from job site, transportation method, commute reliability

reliabilityScore.description: Prior attendance record, longevity at previous positions, references

certifications.description: OSHA, forklift, safety training, equipment operation licenses

notes: Reliability is the #1 predictor of success in light industrial. No-show rates of 40%+ mean proximity and transportation are critical screening factors. Lower submit threshold because volume matters.
